tool.name: WGCNA

configfiles.configfile:
library(WGCNA) library(igraph) options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE) allowWGCNAThreads() ## Galaxy parameters counts_file <- "$counts_file" metadata_file <- "$metadata_file" soft_power <- as.integer("$soft_power") network_type <- "$network_type" tom_type <- "$tom_type" min_module_size <- as.integer($min_module_size) merge_cut_height <- as.numeric($merge_cut_height)
log_transform <- $log_transform filter_by_variance <- $filter_by_variance variance_quantile <- as.numeric($variance_quantile) run_sample_gene_qc <- tolower("$run_sample_gene_qc") == "true"
trait_columns <- trimws( strsplit("$trait_columns", ",")[[1]] ) trait_columns <- trait_columns[nzchar(trait_columns)]
cat("Config loaded. Starting WGCNA analysis...\n") prepare_trait_matrix <- function(meta, sample_col = 1) { sample_ids <- meta[[sample_col]] meta_data <- meta[, -sample_col, drop = FALSE]
numeric_cols <- sapply(meta_data, is.numeric) result <- meta_data[, numeric_cols, drop = FALSE]
if (any(!numeric_cols)) { for (col in names(meta_data)[!numeric_cols]) { col_data <- data.frame(x = as.factor(meta_data[[col]])) mm <- model.matrix(~ x - 1, data = col_data) ## rename e.g. "xmale" -> "gender_male" colnames(mm) <- gsub("^x", paste0(col, "_"), colnames(mm)) result <- cbind(result, mm) } }
rownames(result) <- as.character(sample_ids) return(as.data.frame(result)) }
## ── STEP 1: Load data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── counts <- read.delim(counts_file, check.names = FALSE, row.names = 1) meta <- read.delim(metadata_file, check.names = FALSE)
cat("Data loaded:", nrow(counts), "genes x", ncol(counts), "samples\n")
## ── STEP 2: Prepare expression matrix ─────────────────────────────────────── expr_data <- as.matrix(counts) mode(expr_data) <- "numeric"
if (log_transform) { expr_data <- log2(expr_data + 1) }
if (any(is.na(expr_data))) { expr_data <- expr_data[complete.cases(expr_data), , drop = FALSE] cat("Removed rows with missing values. New dimensions:", dim(expr_data), "\n") }
gene_variances <- apply(expr_data, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE) gene_variances[!is.finite(gene_variances)] <- NA_real_
filtered_expr_data <- expr_data variance_threshold <- NA_real_
if (filter_by_variance) { valid_var <- gene_variances[is.finite(gene_variances)] if (length(valid_var) == 0) { warning("No finite variances found; skipping variance filtering.") } else { variance_threshold <- quantile(valid_var, variance_quantile, na.rm = TRUE) filtered_expr_data <- expr_data[gene_variances > variance_threshold, , drop = FALSE] if (nrow(filtered_expr_data) == 0) { warning("Variance filter removed all genes; using unfiltered expression matrix.") filtered_expr_data <- expr_data } else { cat("Variance threshold (", variance_quantile * 100, "th percentile): ", variance_threshold, "\n", sep = "") } } } else { cat("Variance filtering disabled by user.\n") }
cat("Genes after variance filtering:", nrow(filtered_expr_data), "\n")
png("plots/01_gene_variance_distribution.png", width = 800, height = 600, res = 100) var_plot <- gene_variances[is.finite(gene_variances) & gene_variances > 0] if (length(var_plot) > 1) { hist(log10(var_plot), breaks = 50, main = "Log10 Variance Distribution of Genes", xlab = "Log10(Variance)", col = "lightblue", border = "black") if (is.finite(variance_threshold) && variance_threshold > 0) { abline(v = log10(variance_threshold), col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2) } } else { plot.new() text(0.5, 0.5, "Insufficient variance values for histogram") } dev.off()
datExpr <- t(filtered_expr_data)
if (nrow(datExpr) < 2) stop("Too few samples after filtering.") if (ncol(datExpr) < 2) stop("Too few genes after filtering.")
sampleTree <- hclust(dist(datExpr), method = "average") png("plots/02_sample_clustering.png", width = 1200, height = 600, res = 100) par(mar = c(2, 5, 2, 2)) plot(sampleTree, main = "Sample Clustering to Detect Outliers", sub = "Height represents dissimilarity between samples", xlab = "", cex = 0.7) abline(h = 200, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2) dev.off()
png("plots/03_expression_data_distribution.png", width = 1200, height = 600, res = 100) par(mfrow = c(1, 2)) hist(as.numeric(datExpr), breaks = 100, main = "Distribution of Expression Values", sub = ifelse(log_transform, "Log2-transformed counts", "Input counts"), xlab = "Expression Value", col = "lightblue", border = "white") set.seed(123) sel_genes <- sample(seq_len(ncol(datExpr)), min(20, ncol(datExpr))) boxplot(datExpr[, sel_genes, drop = FALSE], main = "Gene Expression Distributions\n(20 random genes)", xlab = "Genes", ylab = "Expression Value", las = 2, cex.axis = 0.7, col = "lightblue", border = "gray40") par(mfrow = c(1, 1)) dev.off()
## ── STEP 3: Prepare trait data ─────────────────────────────────────────────── if (ncol(meta) < 2) { stop("Metadata must have sample names in the first column and at least one trait column.") }
sample_column <- colnames(meta)[1] if (anyDuplicated(meta[[sample_column]]) > 0) { stop("Duplicate sample names found in first column of metadata.") }
## Check requested trait columns exist missing_traits <- setdiff(trait_columns, colnames(meta)) if (length(missing_traits) > 0) { stop("Trait column(s) not found: ", paste(missing_traits, collapse = ", ")) }
## Subset metadata to sample column + requested traits only meta_subset <- meta[, c(sample_column, trait_columns), drop = FALSE]
## Use model.matrix to convert character columns to numeric dummy variables trait_data <- prepare_trait_matrix(meta_subset, sample_col = 1)
## Align with expression data samples sample_ids <- rownames(datExpr) missing_samples <- setdiff(sample_ids, rownames(trait_data)) if (length(missing_samples) > 0) { stop("Trait data missing sample(s): ", paste(missing_samples, collapse = ", ")) } trait_data <- trait_data[sample_ids, , drop = FALSE]
## Ensure all values are numeric for (col in colnames(trait_data)) { trait_data[[col]] <- as.numeric(trait_data[[col]]) }
cat("Trait data prepared:", ncol(trait_data), "trait(s)\n") print(head(trait_data))
## ── STEP 4: Network construction ───────────────────────────────────────────── if (run_sample_gene_qc) { gsg <- goodSamplesGenes(datExpr, verbose = 3) if (!gsg[["allOK"]]) { datExpr <- datExpr[gsg[["goodSamples"]], gsg[["goodGenes"]], drop = FALSE] trait_data <- trait_data[rownames(datExpr), , drop = FALSE] } } else { cat("WGCNA goodSamplesGenes filtering disabled by user.\n") }
cat("After goodSamplesGenes:", ncol(datExpr), "genes,", nrow(datExpr), "samples\n") if (ncol(datExpr) < min_module_size) { stop("Too few genes (", ncol(datExpr), ") for min_module_size=", min_module_size) }
set.seed(12345) net <- blockwiseModules( datExpr, power = soft_power, networkType = network_type, TOMType = tom_type, minModuleSize = min_module_size, reassignThreshold = 0, mergeCutHeight = merge_cut_height, numericLabels = TRUE, pamRespectsDendro = FALSE, saveTOMs = TRUE, saveTOMFileBase = "WGCNA_TOM", verbose = 3 )
module_colors <- labels2colors(net[["colors"]]) names(module_colors) <- colnames(datExpr)
module_gene_counts <- table(module_colors) cat("Modules identified (excluding grey):", sum(names(module_gene_counts) != "grey"), "\n") print(module_gene_counts)
png("plots/05_dendrogram_and_modules.png", width = 1200, height = 600, res = 100) plotDendroAndColors( net[["dendrograms"]][[1]], module_colors[net[["blockGenes"]][[1]]], "Module Colors", dendroLabels = FALSE, hang = 0.03, addGuide = TRUE, guideHang = 0.05, main = "Gene Clustering Dendrogram and Module Colors" ) dev.off()
## ── STEP 5: Module eigengenes ──────────────────────────────────────────────── module_eigengenes <- orderMEs(net[["MEs"]])
## FIX: guard against single-module case — hclust/plot crashes with only 1 node if (ncol(module_eigengenes) > 1) { ME_cor <- cor(module_eigengenes, use = "pairwise.complete.obs") ME_diss <- 1 - ME_cor ME_tree <- hclust(as.dist(ME_diss), method = "average") png("plots/06_module_eigengene_dendrogram.png", width = 1000, height = 700, res = 120) plot(ME_tree, main = "Clustering of Module Eigengenes", xlab = "", sub = "", cex = 0.9) abline(h = 0.25, col = "red", lty = 2) dev.off() } else { cat("Only one module found; skipping module eigengene dendrogram.\n") png("plots/06_module_eigengene_dendrogram.png", width = 1000, height = 700, res = 120) plot.new() text(0.5, 0.5, "Only one module found;\ndendrogram not applicable", cex = 1.2) dev.off() }
## ── STEP 6: Module-trait associations ──────────────────────────────────────── trait_data_aligned <- trait_data[rownames(module_eigengenes), , drop = FALSE] module_trait_cor <- cor(module_eigengenes, trait_data_aligned, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
if (is.null(rownames(module_trait_cor))) rownames(module_trait_cor) <- colnames(module_eigengenes) if (is.null(colnames(module_trait_cor))) colnames(module_trait_cor) <- colnames(trait_data_aligned)
nSamples <- nrow(datExpr) module_trait_pval <- corPvalueStudent(module_trait_cor, nSamples)
text_matrix <- paste0(signif(module_trait_cor, 2), "\n(", signif(module_trait_pval, 1), ")") dim(text_matrix) <- dim(module_trait_cor)
png("plots/07_module_trait_heatmap.png", width = 1200, height = 800, res = 120) par(mar = c(8, 10, 3, 3)) labeledHeatmap( Matrix = module_trait_cor, xLabels = colnames(trait_data_aligned), yLabels = colnames(module_eigengenes), ySymbols = colnames(module_eigengenes), colorLabels = FALSE, colors = blueWhiteRed(50), textMatrix = text_matrix, setStdMargins = FALSE, cex.text = 0.6, zlim = c(-1, 1), main = "Module-Trait Relationships\n(correlation and p-value)" ) dev.off()
## ── STEP 7: GS/MM ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── trait_of_interest <- colnames(trait_data_aligned)[1]
common_samples <- Reduce(intersect, list( rownames(datExpr), rownames(trait_data_aligned), rownames(module_eigengenes) )) datExpr <- datExpr[common_samples, , drop = FALSE] trait_data_aligned <- trait_data_aligned[common_samples, , drop = FALSE] module_eigengenes <- module_eigengenes[common_samples, , drop = FALSE] nSamples <- nrow(datExpr)
gene_significance <- cor(datExpr, trait_data_aligned[[trait_of_interest]], use = "pairwise.complete.obs") gene_significance_pval <- corPvalueStudent(as.numeric(gene_significance), nSamples) gene_significance <- as.numeric(gene_significance) names(gene_significance) <- colnames(datExpr) names(gene_significance_pval) <- colnames(datExpr)
module_trait_cor_sub <- cor(module_eigengenes, trait_data_aligned, use = "pairwise.complete.obs") if (is.null(rownames(module_trait_cor_sub))) rownames(module_trait_cor_sub) <- colnames(module_eigengenes) if (is.null(colnames(module_trait_cor_sub))) colnames(module_trait_cor_sub) <- colnames(trait_data_aligned)
trait_vec <- abs(module_trait_cor_sub[, trait_of_interest, drop = TRUE]) best_idx <- which.max(trait_vec) most_relevant_module <- rownames(module_trait_cor_sub)[best_idx] module_id_clean <- sub("^ME", "", most_relevant_module)
if (!is.na(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(module_id_clean)))) { module_name <- labels2colors(as.numeric(module_id_clean)) } else { module_name <- module_id_clean }
cat("Most relevant module:", most_relevant_module, "->", module_name, "\n")
module_genes <- names(module_colors)[module_colors == module_name] cat("Genes in module", module_name, ":", length(module_genes), "\n") if (length(module_genes) == 0) stop("No genes found in selected module.")
gene_module_membership <- cor( datExpr[, module_genes, drop = FALSE], module_eigengenes[, most_relevant_module, drop = TRUE], use = "pairwise.complete.obs" )
module_gene_info <- data.frame( Gene = module_genes, ModuleMembership = as.numeric(gene_module_membership), ## FIX: was incorrectly using gene_module_membership for GeneSignificance GeneSignificance = as.numeric(gene_significance[module_genes]), MM_pvalue = corPvalueStudent(as.numeric(gene_module_membership), nSamples), GS_pvalue = as.numeric(gene_significance_pval[module_genes]), stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) module_gene_info <- module_gene_info[order(-abs(module_gene_info[["ModuleMembership"]])), ]
png("plots/08_gene_significance_vs_module_membership.png", width = 1000, height = 700, res = 120) plot(abs(module_gene_info[["ModuleMembership"]]), abs(module_gene_info[["GeneSignificance"]]), xlab = paste("Module Membership in", module_name, "module"), ylab = paste("Gene Significance for", trait_of_interest), main = paste("MM vs GS in", module_name, "module"), pch = 20, col = module_name, cex = 1) abline(lm(abs(GeneSignificance) ~ abs(ModuleMembership), data = module_gene_info), col = "red", lwd = 2) dev.off()
write.table(module_gene_info, file = paste0("results/module_gene_info_", module_name, "_", trait_of_interest, ".tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
## ── STEP 8: Hub genes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── adjacency_matrix <- adjacency(datExpr[, module_genes, drop = FALSE], power = soft_power, type = network_type) connectivity <- colSums(adjacency_matrix) - 1
hub_info <- data.frame( Gene = module_genes, ModuleMembership = as.numeric(gene_module_membership), GeneSignificance = as.numeric(gene_significance[module_genes]), Connectivity = as.numeric(connectivity), stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) hub_info <- hub_info[order(-hub_info[["Connectivity"]]), ]
write.table(hub_info, file = paste0("results/hub_genes_", module_name, "_", trait_of_interest, ".tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
is_top10 <- hub_info[["Connectivity"]] > quantile(hub_info[["Connectivity"]], 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)
png(paste0("plots/09_hub_genes_", module_name, "_", trait_of_interest, ".png"), width = 800, height = 600, res = 120) plot(hub_info[["ModuleMembership"]], hub_info[["Connectivity"]], xlab = "Module Membership (MM)", ylab = "Connectivity (Intramodular)", main = paste("Hub Gene Identification in", module_name, "module"), pch = 20, col = ifelse(is_top10, "red", "black")) legend("topright", legend = c("Top 10% connected", "Other genes"), col = c("red", "black"), pch = 20, bty = "n") dev.off()
## ── STEP 9: Co-expression network visualization ─────────────────────────────── gene_var <- apply(datExpr, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE) n_top <- min(1000, length(gene_var)) top_genes <- names(sort(gene_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:n_top] cat("Calculating TOM for top", n_top, "variable genes...\n")
adj_subset <- adjacency(datExpr[, top_genes, drop = FALSE], power = soft_power, type = network_type) tom_subset <- TOMsimilarity(adj_subset) colnames(tom_subset) <- top_genes rownames(tom_subset) <- top_genes
tom_thresh <- quantile(tom_subset[upper.tri(tom_subset)], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE) adj_thresh <- tom_subset adj_thresh[adj_thresh < tom_thresh] <- 0 diag(adj_thresh) <- 0
network_graph <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(adj_thresh, mode = "undirected", weighted = TRUE, diag = FALSE) gene_color_map <- setNames(module_colors, colnames(datExpr)) node_colors <- gene_color_map[top_genes] node_colors[is.na(node_colors)] <- "grey" node_sizes <- log10(degree(network_graph) + 1) * 3 + 3
png("plots/14_coexpression_network.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 100) par(mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1)) set.seed(123) plot(network_graph, vertex.size = node_sizes, vertex.label = NA, vertex.color = node_colors, vertex.frame.color = NA, edge.width = 0.4, edge.color = "gray80", layout = layout_with_fr(network_graph), main = paste0("Co-expression Network\n(Top ", n_top, " Variable Genes, Top 5% Connections)")) unique_colors <- unique(node_colors[node_colors != "grey"]) if (length(unique_colors) <= 10) { legend("topright", legend = unique_colors, col = unique_colors, pch = 19, cex = 0.7, title = "Modules", bty = "n") } dev.off()
## ── STEP 10: Module eigengene network ──────────────────────────────────────── me_correlation <- cor(module_eigengenes, use = "pairwise.complete.obs") me_pvalue <- corPvalueStudent(me_correlation, nSamples)
cor_thresh <- 0.5 me_adj <- (abs(me_correlation) > cor_thresh) & (me_pvalue < 0.05) diag(me_adj) <- FALSE n_edges <- sum(me_adj) / 2 cat("\nNumber of module pairs with |correlation| >", cor_thresh, "and p < 0.05:", n_edges, "\n")
if (n_edges == 0) { cat("\nNo edges at |r| > 0.5; trying |r| > 0.3...\n") cor_thresh <- 0.3 me_adj <- (abs(me_correlation) > cor_thresh) & (me_pvalue < 0.05) diag(me_adj) <- FALSE n_edges <- sum(me_adj) / 2 cat("Edges at |r| > 0.3:", n_edges, "\n") }
me_names <- colnames(module_eigengenes) module_ids_me <- sub("^ME", "", me_names) module_colors_me <- module_ids_me numeric_me <- suppressWarnings(!is.na(as.numeric(module_ids_me))) module_colors_me[numeric_me] <- labels2colors(as.numeric(module_ids_me[numeric_me])) names(module_colors_me) <- me_names
if (sum(me_adj) > 0) { me_network <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(me_adj, mode = "undirected", diag = FALSE) vertex_colors <- module_colors_me[vertex_attr(me_network, "name")] vertex_colors[is.na(vertex_colors)] <- "grey" vertex_attr(me_network, "color") <- vertex_colors
module_sizes_table <- table(module_colors) module_sizes_net <- module_sizes_table[vertex_colors] module_sizes_net[is.na(module_sizes_net)] <- 10 node_sizes_me <- log10(as.numeric(module_sizes_net) + 1) * 10 + 10
png("plots/15_module_eigengene_network.png", width = 1000, height = 1000, res = 100) par(mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1)) set.seed(123) plot(me_network, vertex.size = node_sizes_me, vertex.label = vertex_colors, vertex.label.cex = 0.7, vertex.label.color = "black", vertex.color = vertex_colors, vertex.frame.color = "black", edge.width = 2.5, edge.color = "gray40", layout = layout_with_fr(me_network), main = paste0("Module Eigengene Network\n(|correlation| > ", cor_thresh, ", p < 0.05)")) dev.off() } else { cat("No significant module-module edges after thresholding.\n") }
me_cor_labeled <- me_correlation rownames(me_cor_labeled) <- module_colors_me colnames(me_cor_labeled) <- module_colors_me
png("plots/16_module_eigengene_correlation_heatmap.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 100) if (nrow(me_cor_labeled) > 1) { heatmap(me_cor_labeled, col = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(50), scale = "none", symm = TRUE, margins = c(8, 8), main = "Module Eigengene Correlation Heatmap") } else { par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2)) image(x = 1, y = 1, z = matrix(me_cor_labeled[1, 1], nrow = 1), col = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(50), zlim = c(-1, 1), axes = FALSE, main = "Module Eigengene Correlation Heatmap") axis(1, at = 1, labels = colnames(me_cor_labeled), las = 2) axis(2, at = 1, labels = rownames(me_cor_labeled), las = 2) } dev.off()
cat("\nWGCNA pipeline complete.\n") cat("Plots written to: plots/\n") cat("Results written to: results/\n")

param.name: counts_file
param.label: Counts matrix
param.help: Genes as rows, samples as columns. First column must be gene IDs.

param.name: metadata_file
param.label: Sample metadata
param.help: First column should be sample name. Trait columns can be numeric or categorical.

param.name: soft_power
param.label: Soft-thresholding power
param.help: Use the value output by the 'WGCNA: Soft-Thresholding Power' tool.

param.name: min_module_size
param.label: Minimum number of genes required to form a module.

param.name: merge_cut_height
param.label: Module merge cut height
param.help: Modules with eigengene correlation above (1 - this value) will be merged.

param.name: run_sample_gene_qc
param.label: Run WGCNA sample/gene QC filtering
param.help: Use goodSamplesGenes to remove samples or genes that fail WGCNA checks.

param.name: trait_columns
param.label: Metadata trait columns (comma-separated)
param.help: Column names from the metadata file to use as traits. Numeric columns are used as-is; categorical columns are one-hot encoded.

data.name: plot_dendrogram
data.label: Plot: gene dendrogram and module colors

data.name: plot_mm_gs
data.label: Plot: module membership vs gene significance

tool.help:
**WGCNA Full Pipeline**
Runs the complete Weighted Gene Co-expression Network Analysis (WGCNA) workflow:
1. Data loading and QC (optional log2 transform and variance filtering) 2. Module detection with blockwiseModules 3. Module eigengene analysis 4. Module-trait correlation analysis 5. Gene significance/module membership analysis 6. Hub-gene ranking 7. Co-expression and eigengene network visualization
The sample metadata table must be cleaned before running this tool:
- First column = sample names matching count matrix columns - Trait columns can be numeric or categorical (text/factor columns will be one-hot encoded automatically)
